tokenExpired.title: Link expired
tokenExpired.desc: This link is no longer valid. Access links expire after 7 days for security.
tokenExpired.contact: Contact your clinic to receive a new link.

login.title: Patient Portal
login.subtitle: Enter your email to receive the access link
login.noAccount: No account? Get in touch with your clinic.
login.lgpdNote: Your data is protected under the data protection law and our Privacy Policy.
login.sentDesc: If the address provided is registered, you'll receive an access link shortly. The link expires in 24 hours.

verificar.title: Check your email
verificar.desc: We've sent the access link to your email address. The link expires in 24 hours.
verificar.dontShare: Don't share the link with anyone.

nps.title: Rate your session
nps.question: From 0 to 10, how was your experience?

dashboard.subtitle: Track your progress and your sessions.
dashboard.purchaseDesc: Your package has been activated and will be available shortly.
dashboard.subTitle: Subscription activated!
dashboard.subDesc: Your plan is active and you can start enjoying your benefits.
dashboard.noSession: No session scheduled at the moment.
dashboard.sessionsRemaining: {count, plural, one {# session remaining} other {# sessions remaining}}
dashboard.sessionsLeftCycle: {count, plural, one {# session remaining this cycle} other {# sessions remaining this cycle}}
dashboard.pastDueWarning: ⚠️ Contact the clinic to settle the payment.
dashboard.lgpdRequested: ✓ Deletion request submitted. Our team will get in touch within 15 business days.
dashboard.lgpdText: Under data protection law, you have the right to request the deletion of your personal data stored by the clinic.
dashboard.lgpdConfirmText: Are you sure? This action is irreversible and will remove your session history, payments and health information.
dashboard.placeholderUpdate: Your clinic will add an update soon.
dashboard.pendingAssessmentsHint: We sent the link by WhatsApp and email. Filling it out helps with your care.
dashboard.progressHint: See how your answers evolved over time. Talk to your clinic about what the numbers mean.
dashboard.bookingDoneDesc: You'll receive a confirmation via WhatsApp.
dashboard.privateNote: This page is private. Don't share this link.
dashboard.lgpdFooter: Your data is handled under data protection law. Privacy Policy

booking.noSlots: No times available for this day.
booking.whatsappConfirm: A confirmation has been sent via WhatsApp.

push.promptDesc: Get appointment alerts, reminders and health updates directly on your device.
push.denied: Notifications blocked. Enable them in your browser settings to receive alerts.

chat.emptyDesc: Send a message to your clinic

link.title: Patient portal link
link.description: Create a private link for {name} to access from their phone. No login required. The link expires automatically in 7 days.
link.regenerateHint: Generating a new link deactivates previous active links and creates a new one valid for 7 days.
